hero.title: Seed Stage Spotlight
hero.subtitle: Where pre-seed founders pitch live to investors and compete for
hero.supportLine: Get visibility. Get feedback. Get in front of investors before your competitors do.

whatThisIs.body: Seed Stage Spotlight is a live pitch platform where early founders present their ideas to real investors, receive structured feedback, and gain exposure to potential funding opportunities.

steps.desc: Validate your concept in front of a live audience
Receive expert feedback and structured scoring

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: From application to investment conversations in 4 structured steps.

steps.title: Apply
steps.desc: Submit your startup for selection. Tell us about your idea, traction, and what you're raising.

steps.title: Get Selected
steps.desc: We review early-stage founders and shortlist promising startups for each episode.

steps.title: Pitch Live
steps.desc: Present your startup in front of investors on the show. Make your case. Answer hard questions.

steps.title: Get Feedback + Opportunities
steps.desc: Receive investor reactions, a Seed Readiness Score, and direct follow-up interest.

investorSection.title: Real investors.
investorSection.body: Each episode features active investors, operators, and advisors who evaluate startups based on rigorous criteria — and deliver verdicts in real time.
benefits: Early deal flow before mainstream rounds
Build your public profile as an investor

scoring.title: Seed Readiness Score
scoring.body: Every startup that pitches receives a structured Seed Readiness Score based on six key dimensions — giving founders actionable, comparable feedback.
scoring.note: The score benchmarks founders against funded startups at the same stage and helps investors make faster, more informed decisions.

forFounders.title: Want to pitch your startup?
forFounders.body: We're looking for builders who are serious about their vision and ready to face hard questions from investors.
forFounders.subtext: Selection is limited per episode. Apply early.

items.title: MindBridge AI — Mental health platform using adaptive therapy models
FlowChain — Supply chain automation for SMBs using blockchain verification
GreenGrid — Smart energy management for residential solar installations
CodeMentor Pro — AI-powered code review and mentorship for junior developers
HireOS — Automated candidate screening powered by behavioral analytics
NutriSense — Personalized nutrition tracking using continuous glucose monitoring

finalCTA.title: Be early.
finalCTA.body: The best startups don't wait for opportunity — they get discovered here.
